---
title: "Computational Mathematics Apps"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="hero">

<h1>Interactive Apps for Computational Mathematics</h1>

<p>
This site collects small interactive tools for exploring ideas from computational mathematics.
The focus is on seeing algorithms work step by step, not just reading the final formula.
At the moment, the first module is on root finding.
</p>

</div>

## Topics

<div class="single-card-row">

<div class="topic-card">
<h3><a href="root-finding/index.html">Root Finding</a></h3>
<p>
Explore methods for solving nonlinear equations. The current apps include fixed point iteration and Newton's method, with visual step-by-step plots.
</p>
</div>

</div>
